prompt: Create an AI agent that translates text between languages. It should have a single "translate-text" tool that accepts a text string, source language, and target language, and returns the translated text. The agent should be instructed to help users with translations and use the translation tool when asked.

checklist.item: Has an AI agent node configured with a language model
Agent has exactly one tool named 'translate-text'
The 'translate-text' tool accepts a 'text' input parameter for the string to translate
The 'translate-text' tool accepts a 'source language' input parameter
The 'translate-text' tool accepts a 'target language' input parameter
The 'translate-text' tool returns the translated text as output
Agent system instructions specify that it should help users with translations
Agent system instructions specify that it should use the translation tool when asked to translate
